title: NewCraft
description: You want to craft BELLS? You can! Just as: Saddles, Totems, Gravel, Cobwebs, Chainmail, Armors, Nametags, and much more!
body:
Adds more than 260 new crafts to Minecraft!

 

You want to craft BELLS? You can! Just as:
- Saddle
- Totem
- Gravel
- Cobweb
- Chainmail Armor
- Nametag
and much more!
